verbGlossary.CLASSIFIED UNDER: {source} item is categorized using {target} taxonomy (e.g., safety risk classified under OSHA hazard categories, execution risk classified under MasterFormat divisions)
verbGlossary.MAPPED TO: {source} category is cross-referenced to {target} classification scheme for consistent reporting (e.g., risk categories mapped to OSHA hazard types)
verbGlossary.REPORTED PER: {source} metric is calculated and submitted following {target} reporting methodology (e.g., TRIR reported per OSHA 300-series recordkeeping rules)
verbGlossary.LOGGED PER: {source} is documented following {target} recordkeeping format (e.g., safety risk incident logged per OSHA recordkeeping requirements)
verbGlossary.REMEDIATES UNDER: {source} addresses a finding classified under {target} (e.g., mitigation action remediating an OSHA fall-protection hazard)
verbGlossary.CODED BY: {source} record is assigned a classification code from {target} (e.g., risk event coded by ANSI injury classification for severity tracking)
verbGlossary.ASSESSED AGAINST: {source} is evaluated relative to {target} compliance thresholds (e.g., environmental risk assessed against LEED prerequisite criteria)
verbGlossary.GOVERNED BY: {source} area is regulated by {target} or standard, requiring specific controls (e.g., permit risk governed by IBC occupancy requirements, fire risk governed by NFPA standards)
verbGlossary.SCOPED BY: {source} is bounded by {target} scope of work (e.g., design risk scoped by structural specification tolerances)
verbGlossary.TRACKED BY: {source} cost or exposure is monitored over time using {target} breakdown structure (e.g., financial risk tracked by WBS code across project phases)
verbGlossary.ALLOCATED AGAINST: Reserve or contingency funds are assigned to {target} structure's line items (e.g., contingency reserve allocated against budget codes for cost-loaded risk items)
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED TO: {source} metric is compared against {target} published industry baselines (e.g., risk exposure benchmarked to AACE recommended practice norms, contingency burn benchmarked to AACE class estimates)
verbGlossary.SEGMENTED BY: {source} metric is broken down by {target} for comparative analysis (e.g., change order rate segmented by standard cost code to pinpoint high-risk trades)
verbGlossary.STIPULATED PER: {source} transfer or allocation clause is defined following {target} document's provisions (e.g., risk allocation stipulated per AIA A201 general conditions, surety bond stipulated per AIA bonding requirements)
verbGlossary.VARIES BY: {source} requirement changes based on {target} category (e.g., insurance requirements vary by delivery method -- design-build vs. CM-at-risk carry different liability profiles)
